title: spyridium ulicinum
intro: Spyridium ulicinum, also known as the holly-leaved spyridium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cephalotaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Spyridium ulicinum include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Spyridium ulicinum can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using it in a salve or ointment to support skin health.
